query:
UPDATE crs c SET status = 'orphaned'
            FROM host_chain_blocks_valid b
            WHERE c.chain_id = $1
              AND c.status = 'pending'
              AND b.chain_id = c.chain_id
              AND b.block_hash = c.block_hash
              AND b.block_number = $2
              AND b.block_status = 'orphaned'
